meals.name: Breakfast
meals.recipe_title: Scrambled Eggs with Spinach and Avocado
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add spinach and cook until wilted, about 2 minutes.
Whisk eggs and egg whites, then pour into the pan.
Scramble the eggs until cooked through, about 5 minutes.
Serve with sliced avocado on top.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add chopped tomato and cook for 2 minutes.
Whisk eggs and pour into the pan.
Add cheddar cheese and cook until eggs are set, about 5 minutes.

meals.name: Morning Snack
meals.recipe_title: Greek Yogurt with Mixed Berries and Almonds
instructions: Mix Greek yogurt and mixed berries in a bowl.
Top with almonds before serving.

swap_options.recipe_title: Cottage Cheese with Pineapple and Walnuts
instructions: Mix cottage cheese and pineapple chunks in a bowl.
Top with walnuts before serving.

meals.name: Lunch
meals.recipe_title: Grilled Chicken Breast with Quinoa and Broccoli
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat.
Season chicken breast with salt and pepper, then grill for 6-7 minutes per side until cooked through.
Cook quinoa according to package instructions.
Steam broccoli for 5 minutes until tender.
Serve chicken with quinoa and broccoli, drizzled with olive oil.

swap_options.recipe_title: Turkey Breast with Brown Rice and Green Beans
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat.
Season turkey breast with salt and pepper, then grill for 6-7 minutes per side until cooked through.
Cook brown rice according to package instructions.
Steam green beans for 5 minutes until tender.
Serve turkey with rice and green beans, drizzled with olive oil.

meals.name: Afternoon Snack
meals.recipe_title: Whey Protein Shake with Banana
instructions: Blend whey protein, banana, and milk until smooth.
Serve immediately.
Blend whey protein, peanut butter, and milk until smooth.
Serve immediately.

meals.name: Dinner
meals.recipe_title: Salmon with Sweet Potato and Asparagus
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F).
Season salmon with salt and pepper, place on a baking sheet.
Toss sweet potato and asparagus with olive oil, place on the same sheet.
Bake for 20 minutes until salmon is cooked through and vegetables are tender.
Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F).
Season cod with salt and pepper, place on a baking sheet.
Toss zucchini with olive oil, place on the same sheet.
Bake for 15 minutes until cod is cooked through and zucchini is tender.
Serve with cooked rice.

meals.name: Breakfast
meals.recipe_title: Protein Pancakes with Berries
instructions: Blend whey protein, oats, and egg whites to form a batter.
Cook pancakes on a non-stick skillet over medium heat until golden brown, about 2 minutes per side.
Serve with mixed berries and honey drizzled on top.
Whisk eggs and milk together.
Dip bread slices in the egg mixture and cook on a skillet over medium heat until golden brown, about 3 minutes per side.
Serve with sliced banana on top.

meals.name: Morning Snack
meals.recipe_title: Cottage Cheese with Pineapple and Walnuts
instructions: Mix cottage cheese and pineapple chunks in a bowl.
Top with walnuts before serving.

swap_options.recipe_title: Greek Yogurt with Granola and Honey
instructions: Mix Greek yogurt and granola in a bowl.
Drizzle honey on top before serving.

meals.name: Lunch
meals.recipe_title: Beef Stir-Fry with Rice and Vegetables
instructions: Cook ground beef in a pan over medium heat until browned, about 8 minutes.
Add broccoli and soy sauce, cook for another 5 minutes.
Serve with cooked rice.
Cook chicken in a pan over medium heat until browned, about 8 minutes.
Add bell pepper and soy sauce, cook for another 5 minutes.
Serve with cooked pasta.

meals.name: Afternoon Snack
meals.recipe_title: Tuna Salad with Whole Wheat Bread
instructions: Mix tuna and mayonnaise in a bowl.
Serve with whole wheat bread.
Layer turkey and avocado slices on whole wheat bread.
Serve as a sandwich.

meals.name: Dinner
meals.recipe_title: Grilled Chicken Thighs with Mashed Potatoes and Green Beans
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat.
Season chicken thighs with salt and pepper, grill for 6-7 minutes per side until cooked through.
Boil potatoes until tender, mash with butter.
Steam green beans for 5 minutes until tender.
Serve chicken with mashed potatoes and green beans.

swap_options.recipe_title: Pork Chops with Sweet Potato and Peas
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat.
Season pork chops with salt and pepper, grill for 6-7 minutes per side until cooked through.
Boil sweet potatoes until tender, mash with butter.
Steam peas for 5 minutes until tender.
Serve pork with mashed sweet potatoes and peas.
